headline: Check Amish Paste suckers Sunday before 83°F Monday
weather_notes: Skip all irrigation through Sunday — beds watered May 29 and today's 70% rain leaves every active bed saturated.
Inspect e1–e4 tomato lower leaves for early blight Sunday — today's 76% humidity and active rain are prime blight-spreading conditions.
Check c2, c3, c4 bean beds Monday — seeds sown May 28 can stall if surface soil bakes dry under 83°F heat; water if dry.

surfaced_tasks.title: Check for suckers
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due tomorrow on Amish Paste (indeterminate, e1) — Sunday's clear dry window after today's rain is ideal to pinch lateral shoots before Monday's 83°F accelerates growth.

surfaced_tasks.title: Inspect for early blight
surfaced_tasks.reason: Due June 3 and today's 76% humidity with active rain creates prime blight conditions — inspect Sunday while leaves are drying before Monday's heat locks in any infection.

suggested_tasks.title: Check blackberry for flower clusters
suggested_tasks.description: Triple Crown enters its first fruiting season (year 2, planted May 2025) — confirm second-year canes are flowering now, the peak window for Zone 7b.
